goal: Find out the clinic's hours, including weekends.
success_criteria: The agent states accurate, consistent office hours.

lines.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes Para Español oprima el 2 Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics part of Pretty Good AI Am I speaking with Maria
Oh no I'm not Maria I'm Lyndon Nguyen I'm calling to ask about your clinic's hours Could you help me with that

Of course Lyndon Pivot Point Orthopedics is open Monday through Friday Our hours are 9 a m to 4 p m on Monday Tuesday and Thursday 12 p m to 7 p m on Wednesday and 9 a m to 12 p m on Friday Let me know if you need anything else about the clinic
Okay thanks And could you tell me if you're open on weekends at all Like on Saturday or Sunday
We're closed on Saturdays and Sundays The clinic is only open Monday through Friday If you need to schedule an appointment or have other questions I'm here to help
Got it That clears it up Thanks for your help I'm all set now Goodbye
